one_liner: AMZN +0.40% flat and resilient while chip sector falls — AWS 28% growth, Trainium chip at $20B+ ARR growing triple-digits; DCF distorted but Parkev's $297 fair value estimate more useful.

price_action.intraday_story: AMZN held firm while chip peers fell sharply. Opened $241, touched $246 high, settled at $242.67. The 0.86x volume on a flat day is consistent with quiet institutional holding.

valuation.summary: Standard DCF distorted by Amazon's complex structure. Parkev's more nuanced analysis puts fair value at $297 vs $242 current — 22.4% upside. Trainium chip ramp ($20B+ ARR, triple-digits growth) is the hidden value catalyst.

risks: Meta cloud entry competes with AWS for enterprise AI workloads
Expected negative FCF in 2026 from $200B capex plan
Earnings next few weeks: Trainium ramp progress must be confirmed
